gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/224)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/224)
text: الْمُؤْلِي إِمَّا أَنْ يَفِي‏ءَ أَوْ يُطَلِّقَ فَإِنْ فَعَلَ وَ إِلَّا ضُرِبَتْ عُنُقُهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Khalaf Bin Hammad,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the solemn oather, either he meets (reconciles) or he divorces. So if he does it, or else his neck is struck’.
en.sarwar: 10. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Hammad ibn ‘Uthaman who has said the following: About the case of a man’s 7/a’ (swearing) abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that if he refuses to divorce ’Amir al-Mu’minin has said, that an enclosure of reeds must be made for him and to keep him there without food and drink until he agrees to divorce.’”
